name: New Tab Calendar
description: Replaces new tab with time, date, and upcoming Google Calendar events.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.googleapis.com
